title: The Tortoise and the Hare
author: Aesop
description: A fast hare laughs at a slow tortoise. They decide to have a race. Who will win?

vocabularies.meaning: a competition to see who is fastest
to be first in a race or game
the hard covering on a tortoise's back
an animal like a rabbit with long ears
a slow animal with a shell on its back
to talk too proudly about yourself
happy about what you can do

scenes.title: Introduction
scenes.narrator: Once upon a time, there was a hare and a tortoise. The hare was very fast. The tortoise was very slow.

scenes.title: The Hare Boasts
scenes.narrator: The hare liked to brag about how fast he was.

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: Look at me! I am so fast! Nobody can beat me!

dialogue.speaker: Tortoise
dialogue.line: I am slow, but I can do many things.

scenes.title: The Challenge
scenes.narrator: The tortoise was tired of the hare's bragging. He had an idea.

dialogue.speaker: Tortoise
dialogue.line: Let us have a race. I bet I can beat you.

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: You? Beat me? That is funny!

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: No! I am not scared. Let us race!

scenes.title: The Race Begins
scenes.narrator: All the animals came to watch the race.

scenes.title: Hare Runs Fast
scenes.narrator: The hare ran very fast. The tortoise walked slowly.

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: Ha ha! I am already far ahead!

scenes.title: The Hare Naps
scenes.narrator: The hare looked back. He could not see the tortoise. He thought he had time to rest.

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: The tortoise is so slow! I will take a nap under this tree.

scenes.title: Tortoise Keeps Going
scenes.narrator: The tortoise kept walking. He did not stop. Step by step, he moved forward.

dialogue.speaker: Tortoise
dialogue.line: I will not give up. Slow and steady wins the race.

scenes.title: Tortoise Passes Hare
scenes.narrator: The tortoise walked past the sleeping hare. He kept going.

dialogue.speaker: Tortoise
dialogue.line: The hare is sleeping. I must keep going.

scenes.title: Hare Wakes Up
scenes.narrator: The hare woke up. He looked at the tortoise. The tortoise was almost at the finish line!

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: Oh no! The tortoise is almost there!

scenes.title: Tortoise Wins!
scenes.narrator: The hare ran as fast as he could. But it was too late. The tortoise won the race!

scenes.title: Hare's Regret
scenes.narrator: The hare was very sad. He lost because he was too proud.

dialogue.speaker: Hare
dialogue.line: I am sorry. I should not have been so proud.

dialogue.speaker: Tortoise
dialogue.line: It is okay. We can be friends.

scenes.title: The Lesson
scenes.narrator: The hare learned an important lesson. Being fast is not always enough. You must also work hard.

dialogue.speaker: Tortoise
dialogue.line: Slow and steady wins the race.
